description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of thong is one reason why we love the summer! This season fantastical bursts of colour and bright metallic tones are SO in! catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge. Product DetailsGold thong straps with a sequined rosette at the apex of the strapsLight brown branded footbedTPU outsole with a circular lug at the heelMaterial and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
